name: components
description: Comprehensive library of reusable UI components and specialized astrology modules. It is organized by domain to ensure modularity and ease of maintenance.

subfolders.name: ui
subfolders.description: Base UI primitives and premium interactive elements.

subfolders.name: kundli
subfolders.description: Specialized components for rendering Kundli charts and astrological data.

subfolders.name: pdf
subfolders.description: Templates and logic for generating printable PDF astrology reports.

subfolders.name: agent
subfolders.description: Components specific to the offline/agent portal.

subfiles.name: dashboard
subfiles.description: Sub-modules for the agent dashboard experience.

subfiles.name: GenerateTab.tsx
subfiles.description: Embedded generation pipeline for agent-led Kundli creation.

subfiles.name: HistoryTab.tsx
subfiles.description: Historical report list with navigation triggers.

subfiles.name: ReportsOverviewTab.tsx
subfiles.description: Agent HUD featuring real-time analytics and credit ledger management.

subfiles.name: ViewReportTab.tsx
subfiles.description: Dual-mode viewport supporting live PDF rendering and archival selection.
